chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 81 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 9140/2025. 2. For orders on MA 9411/2025. 13.11.2025. Mr. Sher Dil Ansari, Advocate for applicant / surety. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Counsel for the applicant contends that vide Order dated 24.01.2025 the applicant/accused Meer Hassan Leghari was granted ad- interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, on 18.08.2025 the ad- interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was confirmed on the same terms and conditions and now the applicant / accused has been acquitted by the trial Court by way of compromise vide Order dated 27.09.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
